result.stdout:
DrainDotNet - Log parser based on the Drain algorithm

Usage:
  draindotnet parse --log <logFile> --format <logFormat> [--indir <inputDir>] [--out <outputDir>]

Example:
  draindotnet parse --log HDFS_2k.log --format "<Date> <Time> <Pid> <Level> <Component>: <Content>" --indir ./data/HDFS --out ./result

Options:
  --log <file>       Input log file name.
  --format <format>  Log format string.
  --indir <dir>      Input directory (default: current dir).
  --out <dir>        Output directory (default: ./result).
  --help, -h         Show this help message.
  --version          Show version.
